goal: Найти один или несколько ортогональных specialist-сигналов или conditioning-слоёв, которые работают там, где база active-signal-v1@1 не торгует, и доказанно приносят новые входы, а не скрытый дубляж.
global_constraints: База active-signal-v1@1 immutable — не ретюнить, не менять пороги, часы, дни, исполнение.
Сырые event-entry конструкции (один event + один фильтр) запрещены — H1/H2 тупик.
Каждый кандидат сначала проходит complement-first режим: вход только на base_absent anchor-барах.
Single-filter entry запрещён — минимум три логических слоя (новый слой + подтверждение режима + ограничитель плотности).
Model-first запрещён до завершения Wave A (low-friction).
Кандидат отклоняется, если strict additive слабый, а permissive сильный — признак скрытого каннибализма.

slices.title: Постмортем plan_v1 и фиксация новых правил
slices.hypothesis: Record a structured postmortem of plan_v1 and fix immutable v2 rules so the agent does not repeat the same failure under a different name.
slices.objective: Record a structured postmortem of plan_v1 and fix immutable v2 rules so the agent does not repeat the same failure under a different name.
success_criteria: Explicit postmortem recorded and agent understands v2 is a different class of research, not a retry of raw ideas.
evidence_requirements: Explicit postmortem recorded and agent understands v2 is a different class of research, not a retry of raw ideas.

slices.title: Построение base-absent research surface
slices.hypothesis: Build an anchor-level table mapping where the base trades and where it is absent, then characterize the base_absent surface to find directional sub-spaces.
slices.objective: Build an anchor-level table mapping where the base trades and where it is absent, then characterize the base_absent surface to find directional sub-spaces.
success_criteria: Map of missing regimes exists specifically on the surface where the base is absent.
evidence_requirements: Map of missing regimes exists specifically on the surface where the base is absent.

slices.title: Wave A — low-friction новые слои на уже доступных данных
slices.hypothesis: Select hypothesis families that can be built without heavy external infrastructure, using already available 1h data and minimal new custom features.
slices.objective: Select hypothesis families that can be built without heavy external infrastructure, using already available 1h data and minimal new custom features.
success_criteria: Small high-quality list of Wave A hypotheses exists, all data-ready or nearly data-ready.
evidence_requirements: Small high-quality list of Wave A hypotheses exists, all data-ready or nearly data-ready.
